raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 1,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output identifies and maps against three prior works (Kıcıman et al., Vashishtha et al., Long et al.) and articulates the delta by describing how CausalDebate extends their work.",
    "R1.7": "There is no citation-level engagement, with missing citations for Pearl (2009) and Hernán & Robins (2020).",
    "RX.1": "The output does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation, but it does flag uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the benchmark provenance undercuts the scale critique).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content) — the benchmark provenance undercuts the scale critique.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output identifies and maps against three prior works (Kıcıman et al., Vashishtha et al., Long et al.) and articulates the delta by describing how CausalDebate extends their work.
rationale.R1.7: There is no citation-level engagement, with missing citations for Pearl (2009) and Hernán & Robins (2020).
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation, but it does flag uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the benchmark provenance undercuts the scale critique).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content) — the benchmark provenance undercuts the scale critique.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
